feedback.text: I like what you are doing, but I think you should consider adding another protection for making all games have end-of-life plans and not render them unplayable once they end support. So that everyone who plays games can know that when they buy a game they will be able to play it indefinitely. Games like The Crew (2014), Darkspore (2011) and Overwatch (2016) can no longer be played since the publisher ended support. I hope you will consider this.
